records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ahab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ahab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ahab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have assembled an extermination team to hunt the legendary C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have assembled an extermination team to hunt the legendary C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have assembled an extermination team to hunt the legendary C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe that you will be of great help to us as you have fought this C.O. yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe that you will be of great help to us as you have fought this C.O. yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe that you will be of great help to us as you have fought this C.O. yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you come with us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you come with us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you come with us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The legendary C.O...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The legendary C.O...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The legendary C.O...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's expensive to hire a strong Counter like yourself. So... without thinking
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's expensive to hire a strong Counter like yourself. So... without thinking
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's expensive to hire a strong Counter like yourself. So... without thinking
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hire Counters? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hire Counters? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hire Counters? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hiring a strong Counter will cost you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hiring a strong Counter will cost you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hiring a strong Counter will cost you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you afford that cost?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you afford that cost?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you afford that cost?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will be much more expensive... especially if she is someone who fought and survived an encounter with that whale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will be much more expensive... especially if she is someone who fought and survived an encounter with that whale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will be much more expensive... especially if she is someone who fought and survived an encounter with that whale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will give you a massive reward based on your contribution if you defeat that C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will give you a massive reward based on your contribution if you defeat that C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will give you a massive reward based on your contribution if you defeat that C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Along with some high-quality Eternium as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Along with some high-quality Eternium as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Along with some high-quality Eternium as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I want are not riches and wealth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I want are not riches and wealth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I want are not riches and wealth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The whale's life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The whale's life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The whale's life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can kill that whale with my hands, I don't care about the rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can kill that whale with my hands, I don't care about the rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can kill that whale with my hands, I don't care about the rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I sense deep resentment. Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I sense deep resentment. Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I sense deep resentment. Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you assembled an extermination team, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you assembled an extermination team, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you assembled an extermination team, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I've heard about these mercenaries is that they are both arrogant and merciless. Still, it appears as though the mere mention of the word "legend" prompted them to jump on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I've heard about these mercenaries is that they are both arrogant and merciless. Still, it appears as though the mere mention of the word "legend" prompted them to jump on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I've heard about these mercenaries is that they are both arrogant and merciless. Still, it appears as though the mere mention of the word "legend" prompted them to jump on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't as difficult as you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't as difficult as you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't as difficult as you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sandstorm with high-density Corruption rays is unusual even for Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sandstorm with high-density Corruption rays is unusual even for Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sandstorm with high-density Corruption rays is unusual even for Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, the Lotus City Management has deemed that this sandstorm is from the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, the Lotus City Management has deemed that this sandstorm is from the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was only one other instance of this phenomenon, and it was twenty years ago.
